tracks.flavor_text: Like a gentle giant looming over a sleepy town, the blades never stop turning.
She speaks in riddles, but the truth is worth knowing.
'work,work,work,work,work...' - Mel Brooks
They rode until the spires were gone, and didn't look back.
Renowned across the kingdoms for it's culture, and unmatched splendor.
'...that's where they get you.' - Joe Miller
When the music stops, so will your heart.
Unstable technology requires constant maintenance.
A difficult journey through a dense forest.
'Every single one of us, the devil inside.' - INXS
Advisors to the Queen. Adversaries to each other.
At the top of the world, a mythical creature guards a vast treasure.
In a city devoid of people, only the eye remains
A massive wall of sand hurtles toward a settlement.
It's a beautiful day, and the entire town is out celebrating
After the cataclysm, after the fall
Bright lights, big city.
A long ride on a snow-covered landscape.
A band of warriors lays siege to a peaceful village.
A new statue is being raised in the central square.
Late night rendezvous.
A soldier need never speak. The news is in their eyes.
It should be long now.
Is that...a dragon?
A neolithic monument to life, and death.
The busiest trade route in the kingdom.
A rare reception takes place at the curious house on the corner.
A military base readies for action.
Rumbling across the plains, leaving destruction in its wake.
A mysterious presence inhabits these woods. Halloween 2025.
Preparations for celebration, or war?
Isotopes and elements found here are unique in the universe.
A journey to the source, perhaps?
'Fire burn and cauldron bubble' - W. Shakespeare
'Snakes, why did it have to be snakes?' - Indiana Jones
Are you the hunter, or the hunted?
It's an honest living - mostly.
Congratulations on surviving disaster #1...
Often referred to as an omen of death - but whose?
Is anyone there? Does anyone copy?
An ancient city that coexists with nature.
Your memory of the last 24 hours is a little foggy.
These little guys can be dangerous in numbers.
How are you getting out of this one?
A desolte cornfield, a rusted hulk, an old windmill.
A remote shrine nestled in a dense forest.
A new star appeard in the sky one evening. Things have been strange ever since.
The hangar deck crews ready the fleet for battle.
Drow are the worst.
As a battle rages below, the watchers call for aid.
These trees didn't turn to stone on their own. Do you stay and find out more?
A remote communications station. Poorly equipped, but functional.
A small industrial city in the north. The people are hard working and kind.
Clerics attempt to bring back an ancient mammoth to do their bidding.
A dusty little shop with a secret.
Automated facility for extracting a rare gas on a distant planet.
A deep sea craft navigates the dark waters of a distant ocean.
A solitary dragon hunts high above the valley floor.
An opulent room in a grand house is quiet at the end of the day.
A secret outpost in the woods, known only to a select few.
A monument to the power of the gods - long abandoned.
A Victorian-era street scene. Perfect for crimes both major, and minor.
It's 2 minutes to midnight. The last train is about to leave, and you've got to be on it.
The chants of the monks keeps the magic in check.
A magical cataclysm has destroyed a once thriving world.
Conquering army, or returning heroes?
Stay calm. Don't attract attention.
An underground biome teeming with life.
You're Toast.
You're Toast.
The mages have put aside their differences to perform during the winter festival.
The monkeys know something. They always do.
'Keep off the moors. Stick to the roads.' - American Werewolf in London
A place to buy, sell and repair your gadgets.
A magical room from which to view the kingdom.
A beautiful little town by a river.
A distant planetary mine contains vital resources, or mysterious artifacts.
These monsters are nuts
'Whose woods these are I think I know.' - R. Frost
Deep beneath the castle, these rooms were largely forgotten - until now.
You and your crew are asleep for the long voyage. What could go wrong?
Translucent forms swirl around the ruins of an ancient monastery.
A large, wingless dragon is protecting something valuable.
An intriguing crowd is gathered - in black and white
'Let's all go to the fire dances' - Killing Joke
Imperial forces are closing in. Can you escape in time?
The Sisterhood's plans encompass millennia.
'Is this going to be a standup fight sir, or just another bug hunt?'-Lt. Gorman
A thrilling ride through a beautiful landscape. With guns.
Mysterious drifter, menacing outsider, or loner hero. You Choose.
Life in a Western Town
A biome bursting with beautiful and mysterious plant life.
Adrift on the seas, what has become of its crew?
Crowded cities can often be comforting.
A sturdy, and gleaming center of commerce in the middle of the city.
A long rumored path has been found. But, is it safe?
Spirits exist in the trees, the rocks, and the loam.
The digital plane contains echoes of humanity.
A destroyed village is rebuilt by the townsfolk.
'There's only a few guards, this shouldn't be too much trouble' - H. Solo
Who watches the watchmen?
Shelves brim with books and scrolls of ancient knowledge.
Two giant statues guard the secrets of the vault.
The fastest ship in the fleet, and the best appointed.
A nexus between realms, these woods are brimming with magical energy
A veteran freighter captain coerces her ancient ship into port.
An illithid ship is tearing itself apart as you and your party race to escape.
What's better than an ale, and a warm fire after a day of pillaging?
'I know a shortcut!' - The bard, probably
Ten thousand hatchlings swarm around the matriarch. The door closes behind you.
'I want you to believe...to believe in things that you cannot' - Bram Stoker
Shadows dance on soot-blackened walls. Molten metal writhes like a captive star.
An ancient tower lies forgotten in the depths, guarded by leviathans.
Soldiers gather in the great hall for a feast before battle.
An underground prison for tortured souls. What secrets will they whisper?
Up is down, down is up, and you're freezing.
A crepuscular paddle among the rushes and reeds.
A city welcomes its heroes upon their return.
An ancient device for instant communication over unimaginable distances.
A community gathers to watch a historic launch.
Beyond the gates of hell, the horde prepares for battle.
Yond hounds have a lean and hungry look. Such dogs are dangerous.
It's a beautiful day for a boat ride around the Greek Islands.
A 1960s-era heist film, starring you and your dashing friends.
This ancient ritual often goes on for weeks.
A picture-perfect town on a beautiful spring day.
Don't call him Mr. Bones, or Boney, or Boney McBoneFace.
War is coming. Mechs and droids load supplies onto massive ships.
An old house has many secrets. Halloween 2023.
Stay quiet, stay low, stay alive.
A once mighty bulwark lies fallow in a time of peace.
A strange old crone lives alone in the forest - waiting.
It's been a day.
You couldn't resist that shiny orb, could you?
There's only one way up - or down.
It takes decades to create an atmosphere on a lifeless planet.
Grab that 50-feet of rope. You're going down.
A horse-drawn carriage hurtles down a dark wooded lane.
Dock workers and sailors prepare a ship for departure.
I have a giant golem, I made it out of clay.
Angelic statues turn to observe - but only when you're not looking.
A massive, noisy, beast of a thing.
A seedier tavern on the other side of town.
A deadly ocean vortex threatens to devour your ship and crew.
Boot sequence, initialized. Neural Network, online.
Mog is an ornery troll who prefers the quiet life above the Arctic Circle.
A derelict shack in the woods may have a past of its own.
This bridge doesn't look safe
A massive mythical bird protecting her clutch.
From battle to battle, war marches on.
This great red river runs through the fractured lands.
Set engines to low, hide in a nearby nebula.
Pulled by a massive aurochs, this wheeled market never slows, and never stops.
Ten thousand years have gone by without a response.
Welcome to Thunderdome.
As your ship approaches, you feel like you're being watched.
A few of these translucent pods are starting to quiver.
Every story has a beginning.
Every story has a beginning.
A place to grow food and cultivate alien botany aboard a starship.
Dark magic. Darker soul
The great stag of the plains is seldom seen, and speaks to few mortals.
Roaming the world on horseback, in search of the darkest powers.
A cozy fire, a mug of ale, and a long pipe. Halfling hospitality at its finest.
A dark and gritty world of espionage. Not a martini in sight.
A vast, mechanical, moving labyrinth. Step lightly.
Life in a northern town.
A secret elf ritual that few mortals have ever witnessed.
Machines fixing machines, fixing machines.
The rigging groans under a full press of sail. Speed is of the essence.
The veil between our world, and the spirit world, is especially thin here.
You probably shouldn't have picked up that ancient idol.
The mead must flow.
All great cities have a seedy side.
The promenade of this massive orbital station hums with activity.
A small group of intrepid humans establishes the first Martian colony.
Everything you need for your next adventure is sold here.
Something is terribly, terribly wrong here. Halloween 2022.
A grand feast in the great hall. Eat, drink, and be merry.
Nature has burst through the walls. A moody gothic reverie.
A clutch of eggs in a cliffside nest, jealously guarded by fearsome winged creatures.
A mystical library in which everything is in motion.
In a warm corner of the Underdark, the fungus folk dwell.
What unnatural forces have imbued these sailors with a foul mimicry of life?
When cities are the size of continents, not everyone lives the good life.
As much a fortress as it is a place of devotion.
War does not determine who is right - only who is left. - Bertrand Russell
Official Soundtrack for Distilled: A Spirited Strategy Game
Official Soundtrack for Distilled: A Spirited Strategy Game
Official Soundtrack for Distilled: A Spirited Strategy Game
Official Soundtrack for Distilled: A Spirited Strategy Game
Official Soundtrack for Distilled: A Spirited Strategy Game
Official Soundtrack for Distilled: A Spirited Strategy Game
Enshrouded by clouds, a hidden world guards its secrets closely.
A Faceless organization gathers to orchestrate events, and re-shape the world.
A secluded spot in the forest where the magic is concentrated.
Looming before you is a massive black gate, carved into the side of a mountain.
Repair, recycle, rebuild, repeat.
Goblins are always trying to take stuff without paying.
Astride a dragon, the wind and the skies beckon.
Surviving was the easy part. Now the real work begins.
Walk the forest gently, lest you upset the dryad.
The last survivors of a dying world continue their 500-year journey to a new home.
Deep within a fetid swamp, an ancient creature lurks.
On a desolate planet, massive machines extract water from the air.
A dimensional portal tended to by dark wizards.
A dangerous, underground port accessible only by sea caves and secret passages.
On a desert planet, far far away. A nomadic tribe struggles for survival.
Humanity always finds a way.
After an arduous journey, the vista before you is a welcome sight.
A small band of warriors prepares for battle.
A coven prepares to summon an ancient spirit.
A misty morning on the canals. Vendors and buyers go about their routines.
Iridescent liquid swirls in its depths. A potent source of arcane energy.
An interstellar vessel prepares for braking. Buckle in.
A massive, spirit-filled city of the dead. Don't kick the skulls.
A foul, smoldering pit, reeking of brimstone and disappointment.
A rag tag group stops to make camp, and reflect on what went wrong.
A serene and snowy backdrop, against which anything can happen.
Last call, before you make the winding walk home.
A sharp-eyed scamp wanders a medieval city's back alleys.
A private facility on a windy bluff. Most patients never leave.
This turn-of-the-century, New England fishing village has a dark secret.
Boston, 1919. Strange things are afoot. You've been hired to look into them.
A solemn ride to an uncertain destination. How did you get here? What have you done?
A mysterious object, dormant for centuries, begins to thrum with energy.
A vast underwater city, hidden for millenia.
Official soundtrack for the Apothecaria, Solo RPG
Official soundtrack for the Apothecaria, Solo RPG
Official soundtrack for the Apothecaria, Solo RPG
A glimmering desert city, built on the most precious commodity of all. Water.
Hack the system, stay in the shadows.
Charging through the forest on horseback. Woe be your prey.
The road is long, and frought with peril. May the light guide you.
High above the city, there is peace, and possibility.
Something has befouled your once productive farm.
A small plot of land, well tended.
A new dawn breaks, and new adventures begin.
Dwarven metalwork takes focus, and dedication.
Nature must be protected.
Between dense jungle, and the ocean, a Shaman calls forth ancestral spirits.
A beautifully chaotic, and frenzied environment for work, or play.
Official soundtrack for the Starforged Role Playing Game
Official soundtrack for the Starforged Role Playing Game
Official soundtrack for the Starforged Role Playing Game
Official soundtrack for the Starforged Role Playing Game
Official soundtrack for the Starforged Role Playing Game
Your strangely alluring host beckons you to join him in his private study.
The galaxy's worst are on the loose.
God of storms. God of destruction. Have a good reason for being here.
A ground assault on a heavily fortified position.
A dark wind courses through this massive, natural cavern.
Overcrowded, disease-ridden and poxy. There was nothing charming about it.
When the blast of war blows in our ears, Then imitate the action of the tiger. W. Shakespeare
These magestic, flying vessels require powerful magic to create and operate.
The play's the thing...
An unnatural rot is spreading through the trees.
A place to potter about, fixing things that want fixing.
Ice dragons are hard to spot in winter, so it's a good thing they like to announce their arrival.
A bookish sort of place. Cozy, and bigger on the inside.
A sprawling, sand-swept bazaar of junk, droids, and everything between.
Floating beneath the surface, one world disappears, another awakens.
A collaboration with world-class adventure designer DMDave!
A massive library inside a fortress. Is the knowledge worth the price of admission?
Deep underground, 3 massive, chained wolves are kept hungry. But for what?
A huge central clock, and all manner of contraptions, keep the trains running on time.
This throbbing mass of bio-electrical energy powers everything.
Strength in numbers, wagon trains headed west for opportunity.
A small shop, at the end of a quiet, cobblestone street.
You're awake, but remember nothing. Now it's time to escape.
Valhalla, I am coming - Led Zeppelin
Deep in the jungle, a hidden city, buried for centuries, is revealed.
A massive arachnid lurks amongst the bones of its victims.
Romantic adventurers, or villainous brigands of the sea. Salty, rum-sodden and irresistable.
A grand chamber where a monarch granted audience, held council and received homage.
Bleak landscapes, dark themes and powerful stories. A Scandinavian procedural.
The bustling courtyard of a castle often included soldiers drilling and sparring.
The bustling courtyard of a castle often included soldiers drilling and sparring.
Remnants of a secret religious sect lie in ruin. Horrid creatures lurk in the shadows.
The constant rain makes the townfolk welcoming, and the inn cozier
Verdant, colorific, surreal. A world where life begets beauty.
A massive mechanical solar system rotates above the monks. Is it science, or devotion?
Large mechanized armies trying to pulverize each other into scrap.
One of a series of brutally cold northern towns. Not always friendly.
When the sun sets, who doth not look for night? Halloween 2020.
As you step into the forest, a warm euphoric glow washes over you.
As you step into the forest, a warm euphoric glow washes over you.
It's dark, you can hear them closing in. It's time to move.
Whirring machines in underground bunkers. The place where disaster is ultimately avoided.
Crescent City, 1920s. Something unnatural pervades the usually festive bustle.
Secrets are hidden in the great old house. Wait until dark, tread quietly.
Between ocean and grasslands, lies this ambiguous, liminal space.
A peaceful sanctuary to contemplate the essence of the sword.
In the depths lie the bounty.
A desolate mountain town awaits a hero.
This gnomish proprieter is a wizard with metal.
The way is clear, there's just one not-so-small problem.
A terrifying squall from the east. The crew must work together to save the ship.
Nighttime in the jewel of the north.
Epic finale to a galactic conflict.
A massive, bustling kitchen was often the center of activity in a medieval castle.
It was like this when we got here, honest!
A lively and chaotic night of magic and danger.
Live in shadow. Live for the perfect crime. This is everything.
Order and beauty exist in perfect balance here.
Not every sword is magical. Not every fight is epic.
The last time you visited, it was full of people. Where is everyone?
A controlled, self-sufficient eco-system. It's not outisde, but it feels like it.
An Official track from Heart: The City Beneath RPG
An Official track from Heart: The City Beneath RPG
An Official track from Heart: The City Beneath RPG
An Official track from Heart: The City Beneath RPG
An Official track from Heart: The City Beneath RPG
A safe quiet place to regroup for the next battle.
High on a hill, amidst a circle of ancient stones, hooded druids peform a dark ritual.
You and your party on horseback, travelling through a beautiful forest.
An unpredictable realm of depression, stasis and despair.
A fierce tribe of warrior women feared for their prowess in battle.
The fee for ferrying the dead is a single coin, placed in the mouth.
A temple to the gods of modern consumerism. A Happy place.
A special free gift for the holidays. Check the website for adventure, minis, maps and more
A Mongolian flavored battle track. Mostly Drums.
An entire planet, shrouded in dense mist, and teeming with life.
The final days of a once vibrant planet. A return to entropy.
Take a stroll through the colorful world of 1940s seaside Americana.
A cozy fireside gathering of family and friends for the holidays.
Midnight. A small, quiet, mountain village in darkest Barovia.
Big, brash, pulpy. Save this for the fights you might lose.
The soundtrack to a place you really shouldn't be. Halloween 2019.
In space, things can go wrong very quickly.
Deep beneath the mountain, a massive lake shimmers before you.
These northern waters are treacherous and cold.
A charming, quiet little village that welcomes you no matter what.
A seedy place on the outskirts of the city. It's not pretty, but they probably have what you need.
Lying fallow for years on a blustery hilltop, the sails still spin as a weary reminder. But of what?
The true melting pot. Language, culture and technology have merged into a single multi-faceted existence.
A frozen chamber from which to rule with an icy heart.
It's midsummer night down at the Adventurer's Arms and the bards are all here.
Desolate, dessecated and dire. What used to be lush, isn't anymore.
In this highly structured setting, those who attend the monarch gather to plot and collude.
Amidst bottles and books and beasts in their cage, toils a mighty magician, a wizard most sage.
A high tech facility for cutting edge research.
A dank, horrible cell in which to ponder your life's choices.
Cry Havoc and let slip the dogs of war
A vast subeterranean network of interconnected caverns.
An echo of the Prime Material Plane, where arcane energy flows like water.
Hi intensity cyberpunk action for highly modified people and cars.
A busy little village on the southern shore of somewhere.
A calm tropical inlet for ships to lay at anchor.
A postprandial stroll along the deck of the world's most luxurious ocean liner.
A Castle's cistern was a functional necessity, but it could also be beautiful and mysterious.
An important economic event in medieval towns. Merchants and entertainers gathered from all over Europe.
A dark homage to the 90s. A great backdrop to brooding drama or full bore action.
A breezy, dense, daytime forest setting for adventure or relaxation. You choose.
Known as The Paris of the East, the New York of the West. Anything was possible.
Horses were vital for trade, travel, and war in the medieval times. A well run stable was essential.
The fabled jeweled city of the north, a hub for trade, commerce and culture.
On the field of battle, heroes are born.
A massive interstellar vessel used for long haul cargo runs.
Antarctica, 1982. An homage to the wonderful Carpenter/Morricone Score.
In a tiny attic room, rain pattering against the window, fire in the grate, pen in hand.
A quiet, magical clearing in the forest. All gentle creatures welcome.
While the crew prepares to emerge from hypersleep, the ship slowly awakens.
A Heroic introduction to the city of tomorrow.
The sounds of Scandinavian, suburban futurism.
A quiet spot, off the beaten track.
For a thousand years the castle has towered over the surrounding villages. People speak of it in hushed tones.
The crooked headstones have been overgrown with vines and all manner of creatures commune in the darkness.
Kept aloft by an ancient spell, this gleaming fortress served as protection against an enemy no one remembers.
Harlem, 1920s. The Cotton Club was the epicenter of the African American social and artistic renaissance.
Incessant shelling of the city below as attack helicopters drone above.
The clothing and decorum of these elite gatherings often mask the undertones of intrigue and distrust.
An ancient burial chamber is uncovered after a millenia. What treasures are held within? What terrors?
An old hermit lives a quiet life of routine, alone in an isolated stone hut. But is there something more?
In a not too distant future, dense enclaves of humans eek out a living amid towers of twisting metal, glass and neon.
With little warning, the serenity of the desert is transformed into a maelstrom of biting sand and vicious wind.
With little warning, the serenity of the desert is transformed into a maelstrom of biting sand and vicious wind.
A busy little mill town on the banks of a river.
May Helm protect you and absolve you of your afflictions.
The sound of the cosmos, or an alternate dimension. Infinite and majestic.
A long, rainy journey in a horse drawn carriage. Plenty of time to look out the window and watch the world go by.
Nobody parties like halflings. Nobody.
Adrift on the waves. No land in sight, just the way you want it. Tranquility abounds.
A run-of-the-mill medieval tavern. No music, just ambience. Think of it as open-mic night for your Bard.
People don't notice whether it's winter or summer when they're happy - Anton Chekhov
The sequel, to the homage that was the first Weirder Things track. This time, with more 80s.
Tick Tock, sometimes adventures need a little downtime music. Lighthearted or slightly sinister, it's up to you to decide.
Big engines, big funk, big hair. Put on your shades and strap in for the ride!
Voyager is the first human-made object to enter interstellar space, traveling further than anyone, or anything in history.
It starts as a tickle at the base of the ganglia, and spreads, slowly, into your consciousness. Happy Halloween 2017!
A massive train network where trains have never really run. Decay and unreality pervade.
Arachnid midwives tend to clutches of unborn with ministrations of blood. And yet, it is a safe, nurturing place.
A secret, shadowy society devoted to the forbidden worship of a goddess. Piety, devotion and ritual.
Destitute. A run-down sump of a place, riddled with poverty and black magic. Undercity home to the downtrodden Dark Elves.
Impossibly high burial grounds where hyenas prowl the streets, and preachers and zealots singing the praises of their gods.
The crystalline, frozen home of the haughty, masked, high elves that rule Spire. Lit by stolen northern lights and chilled with imported ice.
A rotting hole in reality buried at the centre of the mile-high, ancient building that is Spire.
A dust filled, diesel tinged intersection of modernity and the past. Sit awhile.
If you've ever been to a school for witchcraft and wizardry, you spent some time in one of these.
A cluttered, book-filled office in a creaky old house. Rain pattering at the window, and.. someone upstairs?
A towering, immense city, hewn from solid rock, where dwarves shape stone and iron into soaring monuments, and mighty weapons.
The realm of thought, memory and psychic energy. Where the silver cords of travelers drift on waves of pure magic.
A radiant ocean spreads itself before you as winds of color and light whirl above.
A galactic crossroads of commerce and society. The largest and most central ring of the habitat section.
The rootenest, tootenest, honky tonk this side of Deadwood.
The timeless sound of a 747 cabin in flight.
It's the summer of an indescriminate year. The carnival has come to town. Rides, cotton candy and food on sticks.
Brooding skies, ominous horizons. An ode to dark westerns.
There has been no contact with the team at Outpost 1138 for weeks. We have dispatched a recon unit to investigate.
An homage to an era, and a show. With love.
Your journey takes you to a small, tidy village on the bank of a river. The people are kind and the tavern is warm.
An empty factory floor, towering spires of self-activated machines. One way out. Yes..this is what you think it is.
A sprawling gothic mansion at midnight. Centuries of art and artifacts line these halls, but beware! The Master is about. Halloween 2016
It's nighttime, you're walking on the side of a highway and you feel like you're in a David Lynch film. What could go wrong?
The mouth of hell itself, a smoldering vista of rock and lava. Great tongues of fire and sulphur lick a darkening sky.
A yawning, supulchral chamber filled with the departed spirits of fallen warriors.
Hidden for years and only recently discovered, your party must go on a search...for the last party.
Pinned down. Safe for now but chaos surrounds you. Move quickly, quietly, and with purpose.
A small band of horsemen bivouac under a never ending sky.
Adrift on the sands of time, nomadic warriors celebrate a life of conquest and honor.
A TV inspired, urban noir backdrop for intrigue and investigation.
The combined anatomical knowledge of the known galaxy. The best medical care in the fleet.
Oh, it's on. Roll for initiative...
Shrouded from human sight, elves of the forest have congregated here for centuries.
Deep in the heart of the mountain, ancient machines groan and clank with deadly precision.
Cold wind, dry branches, hardy birds. A quiet meditation on winter's tranquility, or a stark backdrop to adventure.
A cornerstone of 21st century culture, the humble coffee shop. A place to relax, read, caffinate. Come for the free wi-fi, stay for the lattes.
Holiday celebrations in a small snowy town.
A slow burn action / suspense soundtrack for dark modern settings
Dank and teeming with the foul and pestilent denizens of darkness. Bring extra torches.
Lucha Libre, the masked, high flying spectacle, is embedded deep in the very soul of Mexican culture.
I am thy father's spirit, Doom'd for a certain term to walk the night, And for the day confined to fast in fires - W.Shakespeare
The darkness seethes and writhes about you as you gasp for air. Waking up is a matter of finding the right door. Halloween 2015.
The joint is jumping and the gin is flowing so gussy yourself up and give the heavy at the door your password.
A blacksmith's shoppe was crucial to the life of a village. From shoeing horses to making armor and weapons. Some even yanked the odd tooth
Two armies meet on the battlefield. Standards wave, drums pound. Steel, horses and bones clash in the fight for supremacy.
Designed by the greatest watchmaker in Olde-Town, the airship 'Gulliver' will ferry you above the fray in style!
Twisting arcs of rusted steel rise, wavelike, over a ruined landscape. A windblown monument to happier times.
Through the haze of bubbling flasks, cages of animals and reams of parchment, a hooded figure bends low over a table muttering strange words.
The person you're supposed to meet is always somewhere in the docks district. Gather your party and venture forth!
A shambling mass of former humans lurches through the snow, drawn to the scent of your flesh. Can you hold them off?
Bearded men hunch over scrolls and books, quills scratching quietly. Outside the weather turns slightly and no one notices. Shhh!
Panic! Offshore nuclear testing has resulted in a wave of monster attacks throughout the city! Run for your lives!
Coiled and half buried on a towering mound of treasure, an ancient red dragon slumbers. You should probably let it be.
A long hiss from a massive locomotive blankets the platform in thick white mist while porters scurry about with baggage carts. Tickets please!
Gentle breezes wafting through the trees overhead, the sounds of the night spill forth like jewels.
It ain't ritzy, and the pay is peanuts, but it's a decent place to get some shut-eye 'til knock-off time.
You don't belong here... You don't know how you got here... There's been a mistake...Yeah, that's what everybody says.
The Royal Salon, France, early 18th Century: a minefield of verbal sparring, whispered plots and social combat. Tread carefully
You and your party creep along the twisting, torch-lit hallways of the abandoned mine. Pro tip: let the barbarian lead.
A treacherous path through towering mountain peaks is the only way through. Pray your supplies don't run out, and your party stays together.
Massive derricks heave containers from cargo ships overhead, while all manner of human activity occurs down below.
When not being overrun by filthy orcses, Middle Earth can be a beautiful place.
The massive viewports on this orbital platform allow for breathtaking views of this sectors' impressive stellar phenomena.
It was a dark and stormy night, the rain fell in torrents -- except at occasional intervals when it was checked by a violent gust of wind... E. Bulwer-Lytton
tags: Betrayal at House on the Hill

tracks.flavor_text: Across space and time, a verdant world has evolved without mankind. How can a planet be simultaneously peaceful and deadly?
There are doors you should not open. Places you should never see. Turn back... Now. Halloween 2014
Equal parts blood sport, theater and ritual murder. The Roman gladiators entertained the populace for over 600 years.
Life inside the walls, where commerce, struggle and celebration mingle with honor, chaos and crime.
Soaring vaults of ice echo and groan, amplifying the freezing wind and hollow noises within.
An oasis of warmth and hospitality in a harsh and unforgiving environment. Warm up in front of the fire, and share a mug of spiced wine.
With its lush interiors, fine dining and finer passengers, the Orient Express was the most well-appointed overland transportation available.
An old cement factory on the outskirts of town. Power still works. Sort of. The perfect spot to disappear - or make things disappear.
Every adventurer needs downtime. Here's a nice spot in the woods to rest the horses and enjoy a hot meal over a fire.
Like a Michael Bay movie in your head. Calling all heroes. The villainous tropes are on the loose!
Journey up the winding path, follow the stream into the mouth of the cavern. Light your torches. Proceed...cautiously.
Your party has assembled, your cart is loaded with supplies, your oxen are sturdy. Just keep your eyes peeled for trouble on the road.
Wiping the last of the Kobold blood from your axe, you glare in the direction of the Cleric. Enough of this nonsense, let's go get us a real fight!
Cavernous, cold and quiet. Ethereal chants and muted footsteps. Paladins welcome.
The collapse of Japanese aristocratic rule ushered in an age of feudalism and chaos. Wealthy regional lords used Samurai as their private armies.
London, 1851. Streets awash in noise - Merchants, organ grinders, Hansom cabs and the ever present din of humanity. Thank god for the rain.
Amid the bustle of commerce, life under the dome runs smoothly. It almost makes one forget the hostile environment beyond.
“The oldest and strongest emotion of mankind is fear, and the oldest and strongest kind of fear is fear of the unknown” - H.P. Lovecraft
The hum of engines, the vibrations of deck plates - as familiar to you as a childhood lullaby. Order, duty and experience keeps ships in the sky.
It was a hard rain, a perpetual rain, a sweating and steaming rain; it was a mizzle, a downpour, a fountain . . . - Ray Bradbury
Hooded figures gather around a gleaming eye, smoke wriggles like serpents to the ceiling. What dark energies have these voices awakened?
If the darkness, pressure and isolation don't get you, the shadows in the trench just might. This kind of work isn't for everyone.
Two great armies lumber toward each other like centipedes of metal, flesh and bone. The ensuing conflict fuels song, poetry and legend for centuries.
Vast expanses of sand, hypnotic surf and the cries of gulls on the wing. Now there's that small issue of getting off this island paradise alive...
Dimly lit and twisting. The passages lead deeper and deeper under the city. The skulls of heroes past look on with blank anticipation.
Towering spires of glass, neon and steel - dense air traffic and a constant rain that never cleanses. (Apologies to the Greek.)
Hot, humid and swarming with insects of every kind. You'd go around if you could, but you know the only path is through.
Here am I, floating round my tin can. Or if you prefer - That's funny. The damage doesn't look as bad from out here.
Where else can you get a roll of toilet paper, a falafel and a bootleg DVD at 3am?
Find out more at FraggedEmpire.com
Find out more at FraggedEmpire.com
Visibility and temperatures plummeting by the second, your only thought is survival. But in your heart you know - you've been through worse.
Bullets buzz overhead like wasps defending a hive. One last look at the girl in the torn photo. Breathe deep, keep your head down. This is for freedom!
Dense, rich and verdant, the forest floor oozes with life and decay. Overhead, the canopy has hidden the sky for millennia.
The deal was simple: 4 years working on a deep space mining operation and you could return to earth a free man. That is, if you survived.
Hurtle through the cosmos! Explore unknown worlds! Face fearsome foes from beyond! Set ray-guns to ADVENTURE!
A horn of mead, a bowl of stew and a hook to hang your 50 feet of rope, The Slaughtered Ox has been catering to the adventuring class for eons.
The listing hulk of a derelict space craft makes a tempting salvage target. But what happened to her crew? Something is not quite right here.
Sometimes having a price on your head isn't enough to keep you out of town. As long as there's whisky, cards, and the possibility of a payday.
In another timeline, in another universe, it was the ancient city-states of Africa which eclipsed Rome as a beacon of civilization, culture . . . and war.
Fear not the mountainous waves and perilous winds! For who among us, will journey upon the sea and not gaze, ultimately, upon himself?
You've heard the stories all your life. 50 years ago this night, an entire family killed after church one Sunday. Only one survived. 'The baby' still lives there.
tags: Betrayal at House on the Hill

tracks.flavor_text: It's hot, crowded, and swarming with species from every corner of the galaxy. The perfect spot to blend in, fade away or meet the perfect wingman.
You want the latest modifications? You want to squeeze a few more years out of those ancient matter displacers? It's gonna cost you.
The gleaming heart of any worthwhile planet. You can get transport here to just about any place. It's a good spot to meet a pilot, a smuggler, or your next mark. Keep your head down.
When death is near, and retreat is not an option. Only the bravest have any purchase on the word - honor.
The blackness of space, the silence of the open sea, the depths of a cave. When you stare into the abyss...you know the rest.
The air before you distorts in the heat. The sun has baked the world into an impenetrable crust. Nothing can survive out there for long. Yet out there is where you must go.
Sometimes the only sure thing is the end. Beyond the adventure, beyond the riches, beyond the fame. Everyone dies.
Sharpen those swords, check the perimeter defences and pray to whatever gods you hold dear. Tomorrow's going to be a big day.
This seemed like a pretty good place to hide, but now, you're not so sure. There's something familiar about this place. There's also something moving
Admittedly, it may not be the perfect spot. But it's a hell of a lot better than out there. At least it's warm and we'll get a chance to rest.
The night is alive with a thousand tiny voices. It's hard to make out what they're saying. Are they the welcoming committee? Or a warning klaxon.
Deep underground an ancient cavern yawns before you and welcomes you, it's first visitors in a thousand years. The denizens of this place may not agree.
A plane beyond your own, filled with darkening swirls of color and mist. A low, pulsing energy embraces your mind and dulls your thoughts.
You're deep into it this time. The center of everything. The world around you thrums with energy and portent...
The stench of life fills the air. Viscous fluid bubbles to the surface in great exhortations of gas and moisture. Something about these pools is familiar..
Everything about this desert planet is familiar, but different at the same time. The pungent aroma of spice fills you with the thrill of adventure.
The devoted stream into the distance. The dust from their sandaled feet blocks out the sun for miles around. There's no stopping them. They believe.
